title: lathyrus multiceps var. normalis
intro: Lathyrus multiceps var. normalis, also known as the Indian pea or chickling pea, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to India and other parts of South Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion due to its high fiber content. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, manage diabetes, and support healthy weight management. Herbal preparations of Lathyrus multiceps var. normalis may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
